description: This pipeline processes image data by copying physical pixel sizes from a source to a target, and then outputs the result, potentially for further analysis or visualization of spatial relationships between different components.

340168be-5a87-4d3a-b9ff-b327148f1bac.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
340168be-5a87-4d3a-b9ff-b327148f1bac.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
